name: Memexia Beads Importer
description: Import memexia beads (bb) issues into the Nimbalyst tracker as native items that link back to their source. Uses your installed `bb` CLI for workspace access and Dolt auth.
author: Nimbalyst

enablement.purpose: Read memexia beads issues via your installed `bb` CLI (which connects to your Dolt workspaces) so you can import them into the tracker.

marketplace.tagline: Import memexia beads into your tracker
